allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); p=d['userPayload']; i=p.find\('speedTests'\); print\('ts:', d['ts']\); print\('payload length:', len\(p\)\); print\('speedTests index:', i\); print\('---snippet---'\); print\(p[max\(0,i-50\):i+1500] if i>=0 else 'NOT FOUND'\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const o=JSON.parse\(d\); const p=o.userPayload; const i=p.indexOf\('speedTests'\); console.log\('ts:', o.ts\); console.log\('payloadLen:', p.length\); console.log\('speedTestsIndex:', i\); if\(i>=0\) console.log\('SNIPPET:', p.slice\(Math.max\(0,i-30\), i+1500\)\);}\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const lines=fs.readFileSync\('apps/api/logs/openai-audit-2026-04-19.ndjson','utf8'\).trim\(\).split\('\\n'\);for\(const l of lines.slice\(-5\)\){const e=JSON.parse\(l\);console.log\(e.ts, e.skillName, 'mode=',e.deliveryMode,'tools=',e.toolCallCount,'payloadStart=',e.userPayload.slice\(0,120\)\)}")
